posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

These should probably each be a separate feature request:

  • Automatic PDF creation into a Files column
  • Functionality similar to Jotform’s Gift-registry widget
  • Files and connect boards in Subitems
  • Sections (with pagination available by sections)
  • Headers with formatting available for headers
  • Multi-lingual functionality, especially with RTF and LTF languages in the same form
  • Logo can be any size and not super tiny
  • true dropdown option where submitters can ADD their own options [imagine listing your allergies or medications one at a time instead of needing a SEPARATE text column]
  • Update feature that doesn’t require previous submission from same form. If the item exists, allow for an update form to work on it by creating a new link (trigger can be anything, even item creation)
  • submission link columns for each form on a board
  • configure settings on each question to extract or base information from other boards or other parameters (see Superform functionality)

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to not use other Form apps when WorkForms is present and should have these functionalities because they are crucial to business. Workforms is getting better, but I’d like it to spread its wings and soar above all other form apps.
